caption: A small, stylized 3D model of the Earth sits above a set of large, red, three-dimensional numbers against a gradient blue background. The numbers are arranged in two lines, with the top line reading "727-873" and the bottom line reading "7618". The text and the globe are reflected on a glossy blue surface below them. Across the sequence of frames, there is no visible movement or change in the scene; the globe, the numbers, and their reflections remain static in their positions. No people or other objects are present in the image.
